scripts.use:dev: powershell -Command "Copy-Item manifest.dev.json manifest.json -Force; Copy-Item service-worker.dev.js service-worker.js -Force; Copy-Item js/config.dev.js js/config.js -Force"
scripts.use:beta: powershell -Command "Copy-Item manifest.beta.json manifest.json -Force; Copy-Item service-worker.beta.js service-worker.js -Force; Copy-Item js/config.beta.js js/config.js -Force"
scripts.use:public: powershell -Command "Copy-Item manifest.public.json manifest.json -Force; Copy-Item service-worker.public.js service-worker.js -Force; Copy-Item js/config.public.js js/config.js -Force"
